-----BEGIN PGP SIGNED MESSAGE-----
Hash: SHA1

I am just confirming that you indeed want all files/patch-* removed from this 
port.

Please read, 
http://www.freebsd.org/doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/articles/contributing/contrib-how.html, 
it is easier to read a change request that is submitted as a unified diff.

Thomas

- --
